docs.title: Getting Started with the Mythic Apps
docs.bodyMarkdown:
Start at the Fate Chart, then flow through Lists, Scenes, and Meaning Tables. No accounts, no internet—just play.

This guide walks you through the basics of using the Mythic GME 2e companion apps to run solo or GM-less tabletop RPG sessions.

docs.title: Setting Up and Using Lists
docs.bodyMarkdown:
Build reusable Mythic lists using Characters, Threads, and Features.

Learn how to organize your adventure elements for quick reference during play.

docs.title: Writing and Organizing Scenes
docs.bodyMarkdown:
Start, run, and wrap scenes; log CF and results; keep notes tidy.

Master the scene management system to structure your adventures effectively.

docs.title: Using Meaning Tables for Inspiration
docs.bodyMarkdown:
Use Meaning Tables (Actions, Descriptions, Elements) for clear prompts.

Discover how to leverage the oracle tables for creative inspiration during your games.

docs.title: Setting Up a Prepared Adventure in Mythic GME Digital
docs.bodyMarkdown:
Configure Mythic for published modules: switch the Event Focus table, populate Features, and use the prepared-adventure scene flow.

Learn how to adapt the app for running pre-written adventures.

docs.title: A Guide to the Mythic Journals
docs.bodyMarkdown:
Create, import, and export journals; understand how Chaos Factor, Scenes, Lists, and Log Entries map to Mythic.

Comprehensive guide to managing your adventure journals.

docs.title: Sharing Adventure Journals
docs.bodyMarkdown:
Export journals to JSON/Markdown and import from files.

Learn how to share your adventures with others or back them up.

docs.title: Troubleshooting
docs.bodyMarkdown:
Quick fixes for common issues and how to report bugs.

Find solutions to common problems and learn how to get help when needed.

docs.title: Getting Started with the Dice Roller
docs.bodyMarkdown:
Roll faster with the system-agnostic dice roller.

Learn the basics of the built-in dice roller for any tabletop RPG system.

docs.title: Saving and Managing Dice Formulas
docs.bodyMarkdown:
Save, load, import, and export your Saved Formulas file—no coding required.

Organize your frequently used dice rolls for quick access.

docs.title: Dice Formulas & Customization
docs.bodyMarkdown:
Build the rolls you want: advantage, thresholds, exploding/compounding, keep/drop, and more—no programming required.

Master advanced dice notation for complex game mechanics.

docs.title: Importing & Exporting Saved Formulas
docs.bodyMarkdown:
Bring in favorites from friends and back up your own—no coding needed.

Share and backup your dice formula collections.

docs.title: Getting Started with Custom Tables
docs.bodyMarkdown:
Create Meaning and Event Focus tables, add translations and links, and import ready-made starters—no programming required.

Learn to create your own oracle tables.

docs.title: Organizing Custom Tables
docs.bodyMarkdown:
Use categories, icons, tags, and links to keep your Meaning and Event Focus tables tidy and powerful.

Organize your custom tables for easy access.

docs.title: Linking & Nesting Tables
docs.bodyMarkdown:
How to chain tables for multi-step prompts and roll-ons.

Create complex table relationships for sophisticated oracle systems.

docs.title: Importing & Exporting Custom Tables
docs.bodyMarkdown:
Prepare CSV, TXT, PSV, and JSON tables for import—range-based only for now—then export clean bundles for sharing.

Share and backup your custom table collections.

docs.title: Journal Schema
docs.bodyMarkdown:
Field-by-field reference for the Mythic Journal JSON format with a minimal example and local downloads.

Technical reference for journal file structure.

docs.title: Formula Schema
docs.bodyMarkdown:
Reference for the Saved Formulas JSON format with a minimal example and local downloads.

Technical reference for formula file structure.

docs.title: Custom Table Schema
docs.bodyMarkdown:
Unified Table v3 reference for Meaning and Event Focus tables, with minimal examples and downloads.

Technical reference for custom table file structure.

docs.title: Categories Schema
docs.bodyMarkdown:
Define and extend the category registry for Custom Tables (icons, labels, order).

Technical reference for category configuration.
